message:
🐛 fix: add pull-requests write permission to feedback workflow

The reusable-feedback.yml requires pull-requests: write to post
comments on merged PRs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ on:
 
 permissions:
   contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
 
 jobs:
   feedback:
